business_question: Which payers are contributing the highest revenue leakage?
business_context: Revenue cycle leadership wants to prioritize payer negotiations and denial prevention strategies.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    PAYER_NAME,
    SUM(REVENUE_LOSS_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_LEAKAGE,
    COUNT_IF(IS_DENIED = TRUE) AS DENIED_CLAIMS
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.HEALTHCARE.MART_REVENUE_LEAKAGE
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY TOTAL_LEAKAGE DESC;
